shadow.field:
// 全局数据 + 初始化（只运行一次）
if (typeof okazz === 'undefined') {
 okazz = {
 circles: [],
 motions: [],
 colors: ['#fdfffc', '#235789', '#c1292e', '#f1d302', '#020100'],
 noiseData: null,
 width: 300,
 height: 300,
 frame: 0,
 initDone: false
 };
 
 // 生成不重叠圆圈（优化版，20个）
 const md = okazz;
 for(let i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
 let attempts = 0;
 let circle;
 do {
 let d = md.width * (0.08 + Math.random() * 0.08);
 let x = (md.width/2) + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.6 * md.width;
 let y = (md.height/2) + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.6 * md.height;
 circle = {x, y, d};
 attempts++;
 } while (attempts < 10 && md.circles.some(c => 
 Math.hypot(circle.x - c.x, circle.y - c.y) < (circle.d/2 + c.d/2)
 ));
 if(attempts < 10) md.circles.push(circle);
 }
 
 // 创建Motion实例
 md.motions = md.circles.map(c => new Motion(c.x, c.y, c.d));
 okazz.initDone = true;
}

const canvasTex = puzzles.canvasTextures['motion_canvas'];
if(!canvasTex?.image) return;

const ctx = canvasTex.image.getContext("2d");
const md = okazz;
md.frame++;

// ===== 1. 白色背景 =====
ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
ctx.fillRect(0, 0, md.width, md.height);

// ===== 2. 绘制所有Motion =====
md.motions.forEach(motion => {
 motion.update();
 motion.draw(ctx);
});

// ===== 3. 噪声叠加 =====
if(!md.noiseData) createNoise(ctx, md);
ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'overlay';
ctx.globalAlpha = 0.3;
ctx.putImageData(md.noiseData, 0, 0);
ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';
ctx.globalAlpha = 1;

// 强制更新（修复灰色）
canvasTex.needsUpdate = true;
canvasTex.encoding = THREE.sRGBEncoding || 'sRGB';

function createNoise(ctx, md) {
 md.noiseData = ctx.createImageData(md.width, md.height);
 let data = md.noiseData.data;
 for(let i = 0; i < data.length; i += 4) {
 let x = (i/4) % md.width;
 let y = Math.floor(i/4 / md.width);
 let n = (Math.sin(x*0.02) + Math.sin(y*0.02) + Math.sin((x+y)*0.01)) * 0.3 + 0.5;
 data[i] = data[i+1] = data[i+2] = 200 + n * 50;
 data[i+3] = 40 + Math.random() * 30;
 }
}

// ===== Motion类 =====
function Motion(x, y, d) {
 this.x = x;
 this.y = y;
 this.d = d;
 this.n = Math.floor(Math.random() * 11 + 4);
 this.te = Math.floor(Math.random() * 200 + 200);
 this.t = 0;
 this.circles = [];
 this.cols = [...md.colors].sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5); // shuffle
 this.count = 0;
 
 // 初始化子圆圈
 for(let i = 0; i < this.n; i++) {
 this.circles.push(new Circle(0, 0, this.d * 1.1, 
 -((this.te / this.n) * i) + this.te, this.te, this.cols[i]));
 }
}

Motion.prototype.draw = function(ctx) {
 ctx.save();
 ctx.translate(this.x, this.y);
 
 // 裁剪到外圆
 ctx.beginPath();
 ctx.arc(0, 0, this.d/2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
 ctx.clip();
 
 // 绘制子圆圈
 for(let i = this.circles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
 let circ = this.circles[i];
 circ.draw(ctx);
 circ.update();
 
 if(circ.isDead) {
 this.count++;
 this.circles[i] = new Circle(0, 0, this.d*1.1, 0, this.te, 
 this.cols[this.count % this.cols.length]);
 }
 }
 
 ctx.restore();
};

Motion.prototype.update = function() {
 this.t++;
};

// ===== Circle类 =====
function Circle(x, y, d, t0, t1, col) {
 let th = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
 let r = Math.random() * 0.5 * d;
 this.x0 = x + r * Math.cos(th);
 this.y0 = y + r * Math.sin(th);
 this.x1 = x;
 this.y1 = y;
 this.d1 = d;
 this.t = t0;
 this.t1 = t1;
 this.col = col;
 this.isDead = false;
}

Circle.prototype.draw = function(ctx) {
 let n = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, this.t / (this.t1 - 1)));
 let eased = Math.sqrt(1 - Math.pow(1 - n, 2)); // easeOutCirc
 
 let currD = this.d1 * eased;
 let currX = this.x0 + (this.x1 - this.x0) * eased;
 let currY = this.y0 + (this.y1 - this.y0) * eased;
 
 ctx.fillStyle = this.col;
 ctx.beginPath();
 ctx.arc(currX, currY, currD/2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
 ctx.fill();
};

Circle.prototype.update = function() {
 if(this.t > this.t1) {
 this.isDead = true;
 }
 this.t++;
};
